div.div: Valhalla calculates the road route; MapLibre renders the returned GeoJSON

div.div:
Choose A/B + profile
Driving · walking · cycling
GeoNavigationManager owns the interaction

Same-origin geo request
POST /api/geo/route
Vercel + Express validate and rate-limit

div.div:
Protected Valhalla origin
HTTPS geo.petakerja.my/valhalla/route
Caddy → private Docker port 8002

Normalize GeoRoute
Decode polyline6 → GeoJSON
Distance · duration · maneuvers · alternatives

div.div:
Supabase route cache
geo_route_cache stores normalized route, matrix and isochrone payloads for six hours.

div.div:
Important boundary
MapLibre is the visualizer, not the routing engine.
It receives already-calculated GeoJSON from Valhalla through GeoGateway.

div.div:
Routing fallback
If Valhalla is disabled or unavailable, return a labelled Haversine straight-line estimate: no ETA, no maneuvers and no navigable-route claim.
